home.name: Iqbolshoh
home.title: Full-Stack Developer
home.description: A passionate Full-Stack Developer from Samarkand with over 4 years of experience in building modern web applications. I specialize in Laravel, React, and scalable system architecture, delivering fast, secure, and user-focused digital products from concept to deployment.

about.title: About Me
